forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the north in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border this afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Sunny. Patches of morning frost south of Keith. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Patchy morning fog in the south. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. Patches of frost in the morning, mainly in the north. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog south of Streaky Bay in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny day. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog south of Yunta in the early morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 32.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
